scene.message: Maki: Ugh...{nl} I feel sick~{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Can you stand,{nl} Sonomura?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Mm...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Up we go!{wait_fr:60}{nl} I'm okay now.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: {ctl0f:1},{nl} that scientist is here.{waitkey}{ret}
Dr. Nicolai: Uugh...{nl} m-my head...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Old man, you're alive!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Something's wrong{nl} with him!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Kandori?!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Jesus...{nl} What have you done!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: What did you say?!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: N-no way?!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Such nonsense!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: How do you know{nl} my name...?!{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Bastard!!{wait_fr:60}{nl} Let's go, {ctl0f:1}.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Wait!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Let's go,{nl} {ctl07:1}!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Wait up, you coward!!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Damn it~{nl} Everyone, follow me!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Hey, wait up!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Sonomura, Elly,{nl} can you stand?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Elly, are you okay?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Hehe.{nl} You're funny, Uesugi.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: What a simple guy...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Oh! There's someone.{nl} Ah! It's that old scientist!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Yuka, are you okay?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Urp!{wait_fr:60}{nl} Bleeeeeegh{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: That's nasty, hey.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Oh, shush...{nl} Ayase's is the clean kind!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Here, Yuka.{nl} A handkerchief.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: ...{wait_fr:60}Thanks, Sonomura.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: For now, everyone{nl} seems all right.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Why...{wait_fr:88} why does{nl} Kandori know who I am?!{waitkey}{ret}
